news.t: Leverage Shares by Themes continues product expansion with a first-to-market new single stock Leveraged ETF, bringing investors an exciting opportunity to amplify exposure to RTX Corporation (RTX)

overview.description: The Leverage Shares 2X Long RTX Daily ETF (RTXG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in industrials equity. The fund aims to provide 2x leveraged exposure to the daily price movement of RTX Corporation stock, less fees, and expenses. The fund uses derivatives to pursue its objective, holdings are used as collateral. RTXG was launched on Jun 6, 2025 and is issued by Leverage Shares.
